{{Quote|My name is Shay, and these are my comrades. We're dedicated to the overthrow of Dictator-for-now Craw|Shay talking to [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|<ref name="Droids (1995) 6">[[Droids (1995) 6|''Droids'' (1995) 6]]</ref>}}
'''Shay''' was a male [[Targonnian]] and leader of a rebellious splinter-group dedicated to the overthrow of [[Craw]].

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1995) 6|''Droids'' (1995) 6]] {{1st}}
*[[Droids (1995) 7|''Droids'' (1995) 7]]
